calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petitioner Csaa-Iib'S Petition And Petition For An Order To 1) Compel Respondent'S Attendance And Testimony At Deposition; And 2) Award Monetary Sanctions (Attorney'S Fees And Costs)
Off Calendar Nov-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Nathan N. Wang, Esq., for Petitioner and moving party: California State Automobile Association

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Petitioner California State Automobile Association's motion to compel attendance at deposition is Granted. The deposition shall be completed within 30 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $837.50 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Petition For A Protective Order And Opposition To Petitioner'S Petition To Compel
Off Calendar Nov-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Nathan N. Wang, Esq., for Petitioner and opposing party: California State Automobile Association

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Respondent Andrea Wu's motion for a protective order is Denied. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Petitioner Csaa-Iib'S Petition And Petition For An Order To 1) Compel Respondent'S Attendance And Testimony At Deposition; And 2) Award Monetary Sanctions (Attorney'S Fees And Costs)
